targets.query: SELECT LAST("value") AS "Solis AC Output Power" FROM "solis_ac_output_power" WHERE $timeFilter AND "host" = '$host' AND "source" =~ /^${source:regex}$/
SELECT LAST("value") AS "Solis AC Input Power" FROM "solis_ac_input_power" WHERE $timeFilter AND "host" = '$host' AND "source" =~ /^${source:regex}$/
SELECT LAST("value") AS "Signed Solis AC Active Power" FROM "solis_inverter_active_power" WHERE $timeFilter AND "host" = '$host' AND "source" =~ /^${source:regex}$/
SELECT LAST("value") AS "Solis PV Total Power" FROM "solis_pv_total_power" WHERE $timeFilter AND "host" = '$host' AND "source" =~ /^${source:regex}$/
SELECT LAST("value") AS "Fence Solar AC Power" FROM "fence_solar_ac_power" WHERE $timeFilter AND "host" = '$host' AND "source" = 'fence_solar'
SELECT LAST("value") FROM "fence_solar_ac_power" WHERE $timeFilter AND "host" = '$host' AND "source" = 'fence_solar'
SELECT LAST("value") FROM "solis_pv_total_power" WHERE $timeFilter AND "host" = '$host' AND "source" =~ /^${source:regex}$/
SELECT LAST("value") AS "Battery Power" FROM "solis_battery_power" WHERE $timeFilter AND "host" = '$host' AND "source" =~ /^${source:regex}$/
SELECT LAST("value") AS "Battery SoC" FROM "solis_battery_soc" WHERE $timeFilter AND "host" = '$host' AND "source" =~ /^${source:regex}$/
SELECT LAST("value") FROM "fence_solar_ac_power" WHERE $timeFilter AND "host" = '$host' AND "source" = 'fence_solar'
SELECT LAST("value") FROM "solis_inverter_active_power" WHERE $timeFilter AND "host" = '$host' AND "source" =~ /^${source:regex}$/
SELECT LAST("value") FROM "solis_grid_power" WHERE $timeFilter AND "host" = '$host' AND "source" =~ /^${source:regex}$/
SELECT LAST("value") AS "Fence Solar Online" FROM "fence_solar_online" WHERE $timeFilter AND "host" = '$host' AND "source" = 'fence_solar'
SELECT LAST("value") AS "Fence Solar Last Success Age" FROM "fence_solar_last_success_age_s" WHERE $timeFilter AND "host" = '$host' AND "source" = 'fence_solar'
SELECT LAST("value") AS "Fence Solar Read Errors" FROM "fence_solar_read_errors" WHERE $timeFilter AND "host" = '$host' AND "source" = 'fence_solar'
SELECT MEAN("value") FROM "solis_inverter_active_power" WHERE $timeFilter AND "host" = '$host' AND "source" =~ /^${source:regex}$/ GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(previous)
SELECT MEAN("value") FROM "solis_ac_output_power" WHERE $timeFilter AND "host" = '$host' AND "source" =~ /^${source:regex}$/ GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(previous)
SELECT MEAN("value") FROM "solis_ac_input_power" WHERE $timeFilter AND "host" = '$host' AND "source" =~ /^${source:regex}$/ GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(previous)
SELECT MEAN("value") FROM "solis_pv_total_power" WHERE $timeFilter AND "host" = '$host' AND "source" =~ /^${source:regex}$/ GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(previous)
SELECT MEAN("value") FROM "fence_solar_ac_power" WHERE $timeFilter AND "host" = '$host' AND "source" = 'fence_solar' GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(previous)
SELECT MEAN("value") FROM "solis_battery_power" WHERE $timeFilter AND "host" = '$host' AND "source" =~ /^${source:regex}$/ GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(previous)
SELECT MEAN("value") FROM "solis_grid_power" WHERE $timeFilter AND "host" = '$host' AND "source" =~ /^${source:regex}$/ GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(previous)

panels.title: Energy Totals for Selected Time Range

targets.query: SELECT INTEGRAL("p", 1h) AS "Solis AC Output Wh" FROM (SELECT MEAN("value") AS "p" FROM "solis_ac_output_power" WHERE $timeFilter AND "host" = '$host' AND "source" =~ /^${source:regex}$/ GROUP BY time(2s) fill(0))

SELECT INTEGRAL("p", 1h) AS "Solis AC Input Wh" FROM (SELECT MEAN("value") AS "p" FROM "solis_ac_input_power" WHERE $timeFilter AND "host" = '$host' AND "source" =~ /^${source:regex}$/ GROUP BY time(2s) fill(0))

SELECT INTEGRAL("p", 1h) AS "Solis PV Generated Wh" FROM (SELECT MEAN("value") AS "p" FROM "solis_pv_total_power" WHERE $timeFilter AND "host" = '$host' AND "source" =~ /^${source:regex}$/ AND "value" > 0 GROUP BY time(2s) fill(0))
SELECT (LAST("value") - FIRST("value")) * 1000 AS "Fence Solar Generated Wh" FROM "fence_solar_energy_total" WHERE $timeFilter AND "host" = '$host' AND "source" = 'fence_solar'

SELECT INTEGRAL("p", 1h) AS "Battery Charge Wh" FROM (SELECT MEAN("value") AS "p" FROM "solis_battery_power" WHERE $timeFilter AND "host" = '$host' AND "source" =~ /^${source:regex}$/ AND "value" > 0 GROUP BY time(2s) fill(0))

SELECT -1 * INTEGRAL("p", 1h) AS "Battery Discharge Wh" FROM (SELECT MEAN("value") AS "p" FROM "solis_battery_power" WHERE $timeFilter AND "host" = '$host' AND "source" =~ /^${source:regex}$/ AND "value" < 0 GROUP BY time(2s) fill(0))

SELECT INTEGRAL("p", 1h) AS "AC Battery Charge Wh" FROM (SELECT MEAN("value") AS "p" FROM "ac_bms_charge_power" WHERE $timeFilter AND "host" = '$host' AND "source" = 'ac_bms_monitor' GROUP BY time(2s) fill(0))

SELECT INTEGRAL("p", 1h) AS "AC Battery Discharge Wh" FROM (SELECT MEAN("value") AS "p" FROM "ac_bms_discharge_power" WHERE $timeFilter AND "host" = '$host' AND "source" = 'ac_bms_monitor' GROUP BY time(2s) fill(0))

SELECT INTEGRAL("p", 1h) AS "Solis AC Output Wh" FROM (SELECT MEAN("value") AS "p" FROM "solis_ac_output_power" WHERE $timeFilter AND "host" = '$host' AND "source" =~ /^${source:regex}$/ GROUP BY time(2s) fill(0))

SELECT INTEGRAL("p", 1h) AS "Solis AC Input Wh" FROM (SELECT MEAN("value") AS "p" FROM "solis_ac_input_power" WHERE $timeFilter AND "host" = '$host' AND "source" =~ /^${source:regex}$/ GROUP BY time(2s) fill(0))

SELECT INTEGRAL("p", 1h) AS "Solis PV Generated Wh" FROM (SELECT MEAN("value") AS "p" FROM "solis_pv_total_power" WHERE $timeFilter AND "host" = '$host' AND "source" =~ /^${source:regex}$/ AND "value" > 0 GROUP BY time(2s) fill(0))
SELECT (LAST("value") - FIRST("value")) * 1000 AS "Fence Solar Generated Wh" FROM "fence_solar_energy_total" WHERE $timeFilter AND "host" = '$host' AND "source" = 'fence_solar'

SELECT INTEGRAL("p", 1h) AS "Battery Charge Wh" FROM (SELECT MEAN("value") AS "p" FROM "solis_battery_power" WHERE $timeFilter AND "host" = '$host' AND "source" =~ /^${source:regex}$/ AND "value" > 0 GROUP BY time(2s) fill(0))

SELECT -1 * INTEGRAL("p", 1h) AS "Battery Discharge Wh" FROM (SELECT MEAN("value") AS "p" FROM "solis_battery_power" WHERE $timeFilter AND "host" = '$host' AND "source" =~ /^${source:regex}$/ AND "value" < 0 GROUP BY time(2s) fill(0))

SELECT INTEGRAL("p", 1h) AS "AC Battery Charge Wh" FROM (SELECT MEAN("value") AS "p" FROM "ac_bms_charge_power" WHERE $timeFilter AND "host" = '$host' AND "source" = 'ac_bms_monitor' GROUP BY time(2s) fill(0))

SELECT INTEGRAL("p", 1h) AS "AC Battery Discharge Wh" FROM (SELECT MEAN("value") AS "p" FROM "ac_bms_discharge_power" WHERE $timeFilter AND "host" = '$host' AND "source" = 'ac_bms_monitor' GROUP BY time(2s) fill(0))
SELECT MEAN("value") FROM "fence_solar_ac_power" WHERE $timeFilter AND "host" = '$host' AND "source" = 'fence_solar' GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(previous)
SELECT MEAN("value") FROM "fence_solar_pv_total_power" WHERE $timeFilter AND "host" = '$host' AND "source" = 'fence_solar' GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(previous)
SELECT MEAN("value") FROM "solis_pv_total_power" WHERE $timeFilter AND "host" = '$host' AND "source" =~ /^${source:regex}$/ GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(previous)
SELECT MEAN("value") FROM "solis_inverter_active_power" WHERE $timeFilter AND "host" = '$host' AND "source" =~ /^${source:regex}$/ GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(previous)
SELECT MEAN("value") FROM "solis_grid_power" WHERE $timeFilter AND "host" = '$host' AND "source" =~ /^${source:regex}$/ GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(previous)

targets.query: SELECT LAST("value") AS "AC BMS Connected" FROM "ac_bms_connected_count" WHERE $timeFilter AND "host" = '$host' AND "source" = 'ac_bms_monitor'
